title: Azure Resource Group
description: Represents an Azure Resource Manager resource group, which is a container that holds related resources for an Azure solution. The resource group includes resources that you want to manage as a group.

id.description: The fully qualified resource ID for the resource group

name.description: The name of the resource group

location.description: The location of the resource group. It cannot be changed after creation.

managedBy.description: The ID of the resource that manages this resource group

tags.description: The tags attached to the resource group

provisioningState.description: The provisioning state of the resource group
